name: orchestrator-batch-pass-resets
description: run_batch_once resets all cross-flow caches at the top of every batch pass: CLI provider persisted sessions (claude_cli/copilot_cli), the module-level MySQL schema-introspection cache, and read_source_tool's docker-cp scratch copies. Rationale is uniform: nothing may assume a fresh poll cycle's schema/sessions/container source are unchanged from the last one. A fresh in-memory known_issues list is created per pass and discarded at the end.
invariants: clear_persisted_sessions / clear_schema_cache / clear_scratch_cache must be called before any flow of the pass runs
One flow's failure never aborts the batch — FrameworkError and Exception are both caught per-flow and logged as flow_run_skipped_after_failure
contracts: Returns list of run_flow_once report dicts for the flows that succeeded
